title: tengine.shadergen.nbus_cmd_received v1
description: An inbound tengine.cmd.* bus event was processed by the silo. External consumers write tengine.cmd.* events to the debug.jsonl journal; the silo polls the journal and converts matching lines into socket commands. Producer: registry handle NBUS_CMD_RECEIVED in crates/tengine-dgc-hal/src/silo/shadergen_handlers/track_group.rs.

cmd.description: The shadergen REPL command string that was converted from the inbound bus event.

error.description: Error message when ok is false; null when ok is true.
